title: NYC Public Space
author: Chris Whong
description: A searchable map of 2,800+ public spaces across NYC including parks, plazas, POPS, and hidden gems. Built using AI-assisted vibe coding with ChatGPT to explore public realm data.

title: Subway Stories
author: Jediah Katz, Julia Han, Mark Zitelli
description: Interactive visualization of MTA ridership data showing how New Yorkers move through the subway system with 5 data stories and 3D mapping.

title: Art Off the Rails
author: Stephanie Dang
description: Winner of 2024 MTA Open Data Challenge. Interactive map showing artworks across NYC subway, Metro-North, and LIRR stations with detailed artwork information.

title: Imagine If...
author: Google DeepMind & OUTFRONT
description: City-wide AI art project inviting New Yorkers to imagine the future of NYC. QR codes on transit system screens let users submit visions transformed into video art by local artists.

title: Skate City: New York
author: Built by Snowman
description: Apple Arcade skateboarding game featuring NYC neighborhoods with procedural level generation and stylized city exploration mechanics.

title: Motion Pictures
author: Ilana Sufrin & Travis Kaufman
description: MTA Open Data Challenge visualization showing subway ridership vs public artwork distribution across stations, revealing disparities in art access.

title: Manhattan 3D Buildings
author: Community Contributors
description: Interactive 3D WebGL visualization of all buildings in Manhattan using Regl, allowing exploration of the city's architectural footprint.

title: NYC Vibe Coders 2025 Hackathon
author: NYCVC Community
description: Annual hackathon for vibe-coded projects built with AI assistance. Weekly Friday demos at 6pm showcasing creative NYC-themed applications.

title: NYC Transit Data Challenge Winners
author: CUNY Students & Local Developers
description: Collection of 100+ projects from MTA's 2024 Open Data Challenge including accessibility analysis, ridership visualization, and interactive mapping.

title: New York City Mixed Reality Demo
author: TerraUnity
description: VR/AR experience using TerraUnity's city generation to load Manhattan in real-time with helicopter navigation and immersive 3D tour.

title: Stupid Hackathon NYC
author: NYU ITP Community
description: Creative hackathon celebrating absurdist inventions and useless machines. 12-hour event at NYU featuring playful tech projects and critical thinking.

title: Vibe Coding Wiki
author: Tanstack Community
description: Community encyclopedia documenting vibe coding culture, tools, and practices. Reference for AI-assisted development workflows used in NYC dev community.
